values.#v: A local variable is declared but is not used within an expression. If you do not intend to use the local variable, Appian recommends removing it. Unused local variables can perform unnecessary queries and complicate comprehension and maintainability.

previewCard.name: Section
previewCard.description: Displays any arrangement of layouts and components beneath a section title on an interface

previewCard.name: Columns
previewCard.description: Displays any number of columns alongside each other. On narrow screens and mobile devices, columns are stacked.

previewCard.name: Side By Side
previewCard.description: Displays components alongside each other

previewCard.name: Box
previewCard.description: Displays any arrangement of layouts and components within a box on an interface

previewCard.name: Card
previewCard.description: Displays any arrangement of layouts and components within a card on an interface. Can be styled or linked.

previewCard.name: Billboard
previewCard.description: Displays a background color, image, or video with optional overlay content

previewCard.name: Text
previewCard.description: Displays and allows entry of a single line of text

previewCard.name: Paragraph
previewCard.description: Displays and allows entry of multiple lines of text

previewCard.name: Integer
previewCard.description: Displays and allows entry of a single integer number

previewCard.name: Decimal
previewCard.description: Displays and allows entry of a single decimal number, stored with a floating point representation

previewCard.name: Date
previewCard.description: Displays and allows entry of a single date (year, month, day). To display a read-only date using a custom format, use a text component.

previewCard.name: Date & Time
previewCard.description: Displays and allows entry of a single date and time (year, month, day, hour, minute, second). To display a read-only date and time using a custom format, use a text component.

previewCard.name: Encrypted Text
previewCard.description: Allows entry of a single line of text that is encrypted when saved into a variable. The value remains encrypted while on the server and is only decrypted when displayed in the component.

previewCard.name: File Upload
previewCard.description: This component requires Appian for Mobile Devices version 17.2 or later. Allows users to upload one or more files. File upload is only supported on start forms and task forms. Uploaded documents are not accessible until after form submission.

previewCard.name: Signature
previewCard.description: Allows users to capture and save a .png signature file. Signature is only enabled on start and task forms.

previewCard.name: Barcode
previewCard.description: Displays and allows entry of a barcode using a barcode scanner or manually

previewCard.name: Dropdown
previewCard.description: Displays a list of choices for the user to select one item and saves a value based on the selected choice

previewCard.name: Multiple Dropdown
previewCard.description: Displays a list of choices for the user to select multiple items and saves values based on the selected choices

previewCard.name: Radio Buttons
previewCard.description: Displays a limited set of choices from which the user must select one item and saves a value based on the selected choice

previewCard.name: Checkboxes
previewCard.description: Displays a limited set of choices from which the user may select none, one, or many items and saves the values of the selected choices

previewCard.name: Card Choices
previewCard.description: Displays a set of cards from which the user may select one or many cards and saves a value based on the selected choice

previewCard.name: Image
previewCard.description: Displays an image from document management or the web

previewCard.name: Rich Text
previewCard.description: Displays text in variety of styles, including bold, italics, underline, links, headers, and numbered and bulleted lists

previewCard.name: Tag
previewCard.description: Displays a short text label with colored background for use with a!tagField

previewCard.name: Stamp
previewCard.description: Displays an icon and/or text on a colored circular background

previewCard.name: Web Content
previewCard.description: Displays content inline from an external source

previewCard.name: Document Viewer
previewCard.description: Displays a document from document management on an interface

previewCard.name: Milestone
previewCard.description: Displays the completed, current, and future steps of a process or sequence

previewCard.name: Progress Bar
previewCard.description: Displays a completion percentage

previewCard.name: Gauge
previewCard.description: Displays completion percentage in a circular style with optional text

previewCard.name: Video
previewCard.description: Creates a video component

previewCard.name: Link
previewCard.description: Displays one or more links of any link type, including document links, task links, record view links, external web page links, and dynamic links that update variables

previewCard.name: Button
previewCard.description: Displays a button that can conditionally be used to submit a form. Buttons must be placed inside a button layout.

previewCard.name: Record Action
previewCard.description: Displays a list of record actions with a consistent style. A record action is an end-user action configured within a record type object, such as a related action or record list action.

previewCard.name: Editable Grid
previewCard.description: Displays a tabular layout of SAIL components to provide quick inline editing of fields

previewCard.name: Read-only Grid
previewCard.description: Accepts a set of data and displays it in a grid that supports selecting, sorting, and paging. You can choose to display your data as read-only text, links, images, rich text, or other components supported in read-only grids.

previewCard.name: Bar Chart
previewCard.description: Displays numerical data as horizontal bars. Use a bar chart to display several values at the same point in time.

previewCard.name: Column Chart
previewCard.description: Displays numerical data as vertical bars. Use a column chart to graphically display data that changes over time.

previewCard.name: Pie Chart
previewCard.description: Displays numerical data as slices of a single circle. Use a pie chart to graphically display parts of a whole.

previewCard.name: Line Chart
previewCard.description: Displays a series of numerical data as points connected by lines. Use a line chart to visualize trends of data that changes over time. If specific values are more important than the trend, consider using a column chart.

previewCard.name: Area Chart
previewCard.description: Displays a series of numerical data as points connected by lines with the area between the line and axis shaded. Use an area chart to visualize trends over time and compare multiple values. If specific values are more important than the trend, consider using a column chart.

previewCard.name: Scatter Chart
previewCard.description: Displays numerical data as coordinates. Use a scatter chart to display values for two variables for a set of data.

previewCard.name: User Picker
previewCard.description: Displays an autocompleting input for the selection of one or more users

previewCard.name: Group Picker
previewCard.description: Displays an autocompleting input for selecting one or more groups

previewCard.name: User & Group Picker
previewCard.description: Displays an autocompleting input for selecting one or more users or groups

previewCard.name: Document Picker
previewCard.description: Displays an autocompleting input for the selection of one or more documents

previewCard.name: Folder Picker
previewCard.description: Displays an autocompleting input for selecting one or more folders

previewCard.name: Document & Folder Picker
previewCard.description: Displays an autocompleting input for the selection of one or more documents or folders

previewCard.name: Record Picker
previewCard.description: Displays an autocompleting input for the selection of one or more records, filtered by a single record type. Suggestions and picker tokens use the title of the record.

previewCard.name: Custom Picker
previewCard.description: Displays an autocompleting input for the selection of one or more items from an arbitrary data set

previewCard.name: Folder Browser
previewCard.description: Displays the contents of a folder and allows users to navigate through a series of folders to find and select a folder

previewCard.name: Document Browser
previewCard.description: Displays the contents of a folder and allows users to navigate through a series of folders to find and select a document

previewCard.name: Document & Folder Browser
previewCard.description: Displays the contents of a folder and allows users to navigate through a series of folders to find and select a folder or document

previewCard.name: Group Browser
previewCard.description: Displays group membership structure in columns. Users can navigate through the structure and select a single group.

previewCard.name: User Browser
previewCard.description: Displays group membership structure in columns. Users can navigate through the structure and select a single user.

previewCard.name: User & Group Browser
previewCard.description: Displays group membership structure in columns. Users can navigate through the structure and select a single user or group.

previewCard.name: Hierarchy Browser (Columns)
previewCard.description: Displays hierarchical data in the form of drillable columns

previewCard.name: Hierarchy Browser (Tree)
previewCard.description: Displays hierarchical data in the form of drillable tree

previewCard.name: Org Chart
previewCard.description: Displays the organizational structure of users within Appian based on the users' Supervisor field values

cseRuleDefinition.name: backgroundColor
cseRuleDefinition.supportedUserAgents: Google Chrome, Mozilla Firefox, Microsoft Internet Explorer 11, Microsoft Edge, Apple Safari, Appian for Mobile

cseRuleDefinition.name: resizeTest
richTextField
cseRuleDefinition.supportedUserAgents: Google Chrome, Mozilla Firefox, Microsoft Edge, Apple Safari, Microsoft Internet Explorer 11, Appian for Mobile

cseRuleDefinition.name: secretHideout
cseRuleDefinition.supportedUserAgents: Google Chrome, Mozilla Firefox, Microsoft Internet Explorer 11, Microsoft Edge, Apple Safari, Appian for Mobile

cseRuleDefinition.name: servletTest
mapField_v2
cseRuleDefinition.supportedUserAgents: Google Chrome, Mozilla Firefox, Microsoft Internet Explorer 11, Microsoft Edge, Apple Safari, Appian for Mobile

cseRuleDefinition.name: parameterTest_v2
cseRuleDefinition.supportedUserAgents: Google Chrome, Mozilla Firefox, Microsoft Internet Explorer 11, Microsoft Edge, Apple Safari, Appian for Mobile

previewCard.name: Activity History
previewCard.description: Displays a list of system actions or user activities

previewCard.name: Alert Banners
previewCard.description: Displays a list of alerts and distinguishes between types of alerts using icons and colors

previewCard.name: Breadcrumbs
previewCard.description: Allows users to easily orient themselves on a site by showing them where they are and where they came from

previewCard.name: Cards As Buttons
previewCard.description: Displays a limited set of choices. Good for showing details about the choices and providing larger click targets for users.

previewCard.name: Cards As Choices
previewCard.description: Displays a small list of choices. Good for short, multiple choice forms.

previewCard.name: Cards As List Items
previewCard.description: Displays a list of items with images and details. Good for displaying visual media in a list.

previewCard.name: Comments
previewCard.description: Displays a list of users' messages, comments, or notes in chronological order, alongside the user's initials or profile picture

previewCard.name: Comments (Lightweight)
previewCard.description: Displays a small list of users' messages, comments, or notes in chronological order

previewCard.name: Document List
previewCard.description: Provides an easily searched and filtered list of documents

previewCard.name: Drilldown
previewCard.description: Allows users to view more details about a selected item in a grid

previewCard.name: Drilldown Report
previewCard.description: Displays bar and column charts that users can click into to see more details about the chart's data

previewCard.name: Dual Picklists
previewCard.description: Displays side-by-side lists that allow users to move items from one list to the other

previewCard.name: Duration Display
previewCard.description: Displays the amount of time in between actions

previewCard.name: Dynamic Inputs
previewCard.description: Allows users to easily add and remove as many values as needed

previewCard.name: Event Timeline
previewCard.description: Displays a list of events and actions in chronological order

previewCard.name: Event Timeline (Detailed)
previewCard.description: Displays a highly detailed list of events in chronological order

previewCard.name: Form Steps
previewCard.description: Displays complex forms as a series of quick steps

previewCard.name: Grid With Detail View
previewCard.description: Allows users to select a grid item to view its details beside the grid

previewCard.name: Grid With Selection
previewCard.description: Allows users to easily select items from a grid and view them in a list

previewCard.name: Image Gallery
previewCard.description: Displays images in a gallery format

previewCard.name: Inline Survey
previewCard.description: Provides a simple, easy-to-navigate survey. Good for including a survey on a page with other content.

previewCard.name: Inline Tags
previewCard.description: Displays tags and rich text side by side

previewCard.name: KPI 1
previewCard.description: Displays important performance metrics and data for multiple sets of data. Good for prominently displaying numerical data and rates of change.

previewCard.name: KPI 2
previewCard.description: Displays important performance metrics and data for multiple sets of data. Good for comparing numerical data, such as comparing current values to target values.

previewCard.name: KPI 3
previewCard.description: Displays important performance metrics and data for multiple sets of data. Good for prominently displaying a small set of numerical data.

previewCard.name: KPI 4
previewCard.description: Displays important performance metrics and data for multiple sets of data. Good for emphasizing the rates of change in a set of numerical data.

previewCard.name: KPI 5 (Single Card)
previewCard.description: Displays important performance metrics, data, and details for a single set of numerical data

previewCard.name: Leaderboard
previewCard.description: Displays a selection of ranked data and details

previewCard.name: Milestone (Bar)
previewCard.description: Displays a progress indicator to guide users through steps in a task. Good for breaking up long forms or combining smaller forms to streamline a process.

previewCard.name: Milestone (Stamp)
previewCard.description: Displays a simple progress indicator to guide users through steps in a task

previewCard.name: Milestone (Vertical)
previewCard.description: Displays a detailed progress indicator to guide users through steps in a task

previewCard.name: More-Less Link
previewCard.description: Displays a link that lets users toggle between seeing more or less content in a grid row. Good for showing grid rows of varying text lengths in a uniform and readable format.

previewCard.name: Navigation
previewCard.description: Displays a simple, easy-to-use side navigation menu

previewCard.name: Navigation (Collapsible)
previewCard.description: Displays a simple, easy-to-use side navigation menu that can be collapsed to reduce clutter

previewCard.name: Navigation (Lightweight)
previewCard.description: Displays a streamlined, easy-to-use side navigation menu that reduces textual clutter

previewCard.name: Navigation (Stamps)
previewCard.description: Displays an easy-to-use side navigation menu that helps users quickly navigate a site or page by sections

previewCard.name: Navigation (Subsections)
previewCard.description: Displays an unobtrusive, easy-to-use side navigation menu

previewCard.name: Stamp Steps (Icon)
previewCard.description: Provides users with a simple, visual guide through steps of a process. Good for simple steps that don't need much context.

previewCard.name: Stamp Steps (Numbered)
previewCard.description: Provides users with a detailed guide through steps of a process. Good for more complicated steps that need context.

previewCard.name: Tabs
previewCard.description: Displays multiple interfaces as tabs on a single page

previewCard.name: Tabs (Cards)
previewCard.description: Displays multiple interfaces as large, easy-to-click tabs on a single page

previewCard.name: Tabs (Lightweight)
previewCard.description: Displays multiple interfaces as unobtrusive tabs on a single page

previewCard.name: Task Report
previewCard.description: Provides a simple way to create and display an Appian task report

previewCard.name: Timeline
previewCard.description: Displays user progress through steps in a process or task

previewCard.name: Timeline (Lightweight)
previewCard.description: Displays a simple view of a user's progress through steps in a process or task

previewCard.name: Timeline (Progress)
previewCard.description: Displays a detailed view of a user's ongoing progress through steps in a process or task

previewCard.name: User List
previewCard.description: Displays all users of a group in one column

values.#v: Turn your team's design standards into easily accessible building blocks

#v.description: Record is a list of named values.
Dictionary is mapping of keys to values.
A Save specifies the variables where end user values are saved. Values may be modified prior to saving by using the << operator. This applies to SAIL components.
